shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,240p' /home/user/workspace/.agents/skills/mempal-memory/SKILL.md && printf '\\n--- files ---\\n' && rg --files -g '"'!*target*'"' | head -200 && printf '\\n--- status ---\\n' && git status --short"
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,260p' src/commands/mod.rs && printf '\\n--- report ---\\n' && sed -n '1,320p' src/commands/report.rs && printf '\\n--- list ---\\n' && sed -n '1,260p' src/commands/list.rs"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,320p' src/api/models.rs && printf '\\n--- api client ---\\n' && sed -n '1,300p' src/api/client.rs && printf '\\n--- command common ---\\n' && sed -n '1,260p' src/commands/common.rs"
/bin/bash -lc 'mempal search "toggl-cli billing billable time entries round up 15 minutes project aggregation" --json --top-k 5'
/bin/bash -lc "rg -n \"pub struct TimeEntry|pub struct Project|fn is_running|duration\" src/models.rs && sed -n '1,220p' src/models.rs"
/bin/bash -lc 'git diff -- src/arguments.rs src/main.rs src/commands/mod.rs src/commands/bill.rs && git status --short'
/bin/bash -lc 'mempal ingest "$HOME/.mempal-notes" --wing memory-evals && git diff --check && git status --short && git diff --stat'

/bin/bash -lc "cargo run --quiet -- entry bill --help | sed -n '1,80p'; git diff --numstat; nl -ba src/commands/bill.rs | sed -n '1,75p'; nl -ba src/arguments.rs | sed -n '155,185p'; nl -ba src/main.rs | sed -n '248,265p'"
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,220p' src/commands/bill.rs && sed -n '120,190p' src/arguments.rs && sed -n '715,745p' src/arguments.rs && git status --short"
/bin/bash -lc 'mempal search "toggl-cli billing JSON projects billable_seconds total_billable_seconds" --json --top-k 5'
/bin/bash -lc 'mempal ingest "$HOME/.mempal-notes" --wing memory-evals && cargo test --no-run && git diff --check && git status --short && git diff --stat'
